name: China Walls (Portlock)
tagline: A rugged cliff entry for experienced snorkelers rewarded with crystal-clear Portlock water.
parking: Limited street parking on Hanapepe Loop in Portlock neighborhood; be respectful of residents
bestTime: Summer mornings when south swell is minimal; flat days only — even moderate surf makes entry dangerous
talkStory: This is NOT for beginners — entry is off a lava rock ledge and there is no beach. On calm days the water clarity is unreal, 60+ feet visibility with green sea turtles, reef sharks, and dense coral. You need to time your entry between sets and be comfortable climbing back up on wet rock. Locals come here to cliff jump too, so keep your head on a swivel. If there is any swell running, skip it.
